qa_pairs.question: Which clusters are considered general-purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The general-purpose clusters are Béluga, Cedar, and Graham.

qa_pairs.question: Who can access a RAC award on general-purpose clusters by default?
qa_pairs.answer: By default, every role sponsored through your Alliance CCDB registration and any co-PIs listed on your RAC application have access to your RAC award on general-purpose clusters.

qa_pairs.question: Is it possible to have an allocation on both Niagara and a general-purpose cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, it is possible to have an allocation on both Niagara and a general-purpose cluster, in which case more than one information tab would apply.
